response: The April marketing campaign generated 45 K impressions, 2.3 K clicks (5.1 % CTR) and 187 sign‑ups (8.1 % conversion) at a cost of $12 K, giving a $64 CAC; CTR rose 1.2 pp from March while conversion slipped 0.8 pp. The team recommends A/B testing the landing‑page CTA to boost conversion.
